---
title: "alluvial_plot"
author: "Ruwen Zhou"
date: "6/11/2024"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggalluvial)
library(readr)
library(plyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
library(vegan)
library(phyloseq)
```

```{r}
# microbiome_data = read.csv('data/butyrate_pick.csv', header = TRUE)
# food_data = read.csv('data/Summarized_Food_Categories_Only.csv', header = TRUE)
# meta_data = read.csv('data/demo_535.csv', header = TRUE)
# rownames(microbiome_data) = microbiome_data[,1]
# rownames(food_data) = food_data[,1]
# rownames(meta_data) = meta_data[,1]
# microbiome_data[1] = NULL
# food_data[1] = NULL
# meta_data[1] = NULL
# 
# microbiome_data
# food_data
# meta_data
```

```{r}

meta_data <- read.csv("data/demo_535.csv")
food_intake <- read.csv("data/Summarized_Food_Categories_Only.csv")
species_abundance <- read.csv("data/butyrate_pick.csv")
meta_data = meta_data[,c("Participant_ID","FREG5_Ethnic_Group")]


full_data <- meta_data %>%
  left_join(food_intake, by = "Participant_ID") %>%
  left_join(species_abundance, by = "Participant_ID")

colnames(full_data)

```

```{r}

alluvial_data <- full_data %>%
  select(Participant_ID, FREG5_Ethnic_Group, Fish, Crustacean, Mollusk, Seafood_dishes,Poultry,Red_meat,Meat_dishes,Processed_meat, Dairy,Cruciferous_vegetables,
         Legumes, Mushroom, Fruits, Wholegrain, Chapati, Noodle_dishes, Deep_fried,Coffee, Tea, Faecalibacterium.prausnitzii, Subdoligranulum.variabile,
         Anaerotruncus.colihominis, Ruminococcus.champanellensis, Butyrivibrio.fibrisolvens, Roseburia.hominis, Roseburia.intestinalis, 
         Anaerostipes.caccae, Anaerostipes.rhamnosivorans) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Mollusk, Red_meat,Meat_dishes,Processed_meat, Deep_fried, Dairy, Cruciferous_vegetables, Legumes, Mushroom, 
                        Fruits, Wholegrain, Chapati, Coffee),
               names_to = "Food_Group",
               values_to = "Intake") %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Faecalibacterium.prausnitzii, Anaerotruncus.colihominis, Roseburia.hominis, Roseburia.intestinalis),
               names_to = "Microbiome",
               values_to = "Abundance")
alluvial_data = subset(alluvial_data, FREG5_Ethnic_Group != "O")
alluvial_data
```
```{r fig.width=10, fig.height=15}
png("figure/alluvial_ethnic_food_micro.png", width = 1000, height = 1400, res = 120)
ggplot(data = alluvial_data,
       aes(axis1 = Food_Group, axis2 = FREG5_Ethnic_Group, axis3 = Microbiome, y = Abundance)) +
  geom_alluvium(aes(fill = FREG5_Ethnic_Group)) +
  geom_stratum() +
  geom_text(stat = "stratum", aes(label = after_stat(stratum)), size = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  ggtitle("Relationships between Ethnicity, Diet, and Microbiome") +
  xlab("Categories") +
  ylab("Abundance")
dev.off()
```
